heading: Furnishing of heraldic services
label: 7594 Furnishing of heraldic services
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4594 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.label: a
children.text: Under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of the Army, an authority designated by him may, upon the request of, and subject to approval by, the Secretary of another military department, design flags, insignia, badges, medals, seals, decorations, guidons, streamers, finial pieces for flagstaffs, buttons, buckles, awards, trophies, marks, emblems, rosettes, scrolls, braids, ribbons, knots, tabs, cords, and similar items for the requesting department.

children.label: b
children.text: Upon request the Secretary of the Army may advise other departments and agencies of the United States on matters of heraldry.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary of the Army may prescribe regulations providing for reimbursement for services furnished under this section.
